name: Transcode & Replace
description: Batch-transcode library media to HEVC/AV1 and atomically replace the original file, with hardware detection, verification gates, HDR preservation and a persistent job queue.
overview: Transcode library media and replace the originals, safely.

versions.changelog: First release. Full pipeline: hardware probe, persistent queue, discovery task, ffprobe verification gates, optional VMAF gate, HDR/Dolby Vision handling, playback/idle/disk guards and atomic replace with backup and permission preservation.
